title: Relative words: donde and quien
subtitle: Add where and who in simple clauses.
overview: Quien refers to a person, often after a preposition or comma.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: It is the cafe where I study.
Ana es la persona con quien hablé.
Ana is the person with whom I spoke.
La ciudad donde vivo es tranquila.
The city where I live is quiet.

items.es: Esta es la tienda donde compré el pan.
items.en: This is the store where I bought the bread.

items.es: El hotel donde dormimos era cómodo.
items.en: The hotel where we slept was comfortable.

items.es: Luis es el amigo con quien fui al concierto.
items.en: Luis is the friend with whom I went to the concert.

items.es: La profesora, quien vive cerca, llegó temprano.
items.en: The teacher, who lives nearby, arrived early.

items.es: Quiero volver al lugar donde comimos ayer.
items.en: I want to return to the place where we ate yesterday.
